notes: Implemented as a TimeVariantModulator. The macro slot value arrives via macroControllerMoved() called by the macro control system, not via the audio signal path. The smoothing operates at the control rate (sampleRate / HISE_CONTROL_RATE_DOWNSAMPLING_FACTOR). When smoothing is active, calculateBlock() processes sample-by-sample; otherwise it fills the buffer with a constant value. The table lookup is applied in macroControllerMoved() before smoothing, so the smoother operates on the post-table value. MacroValue is a write-only parameter driven by the macro system - getAttribute returns a hardcoded 1.0 with jassertfalse.

condition.whenTrue: Macro value passed through lookup table
